meta.title: TOP GUN: Maverick--Best Scenes Explained
meta.description:
-- The first 100 people to use code [HASARDLEE] at the link below will get 60% off of Incogni: https://incogni.com/hasardlee -- Watch fighter pilots "Slick" Baum (F-16, Thunderbird Pilot, USAF Weapons School Instructor) and Hasard Lee (F-16 & F-35 Instructor) react to a breakdown Top Gun: Maverick on what it gets right and what it gets wrong.

The Art of Clear Thinking Book: https://static.macmillan.com/static/smp/art-of-clear-thinking/

📷 Produced by: Hasard Lee & Michael Cunningham

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/hasardlee
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/hasardlee/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/hasardlee
Email--hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

🎙 Listen to the Podcast-- https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen

00:00 - Intro
00:20 - Breaking Hard Deck
02:01 - Mission Training
02:36 - Student G-LOC
04:24 - Offer
05:29 - Bird Strike!
06:30 - 10G's in an F-18?!
07:17 - Dagger, Attack (IADs & RES Cell Tactics)
08:07 - Targeting Pod Malfunction
08:30 - Now it gets Hollywood
09:52 - F-14 vs Russian SU-57
10:32 - Canyon Gunfight
11:52 - Plot Armor vs. High Explosive Rounds
12:29 - Any landing you walk away from...
13:17 - Thank you!
